stemHtml: Whilst flying in the NAT HLA, an aircraft encounters weather that requires an immediate deviation and a descent, what is the most appropriate action for the crew to take?

options.a: Descend as quickly as possible without any lateral deviation.
options.b: Immediately descend to 500 ft away from the level.
options.d: Deviate 30° left or right and descend 300 ft away from the assigned level.
